Phase-2.NAME: Edge and Install Path
Phase-2.Goal: Make the deployment reproducible from a clean VPS while securing the 443 edge for both portal and proxy traffic.

Steps.step-1: Design the interactive `install.sh` operator flow and idempotent rerun behavior.
Steps.step-2: Choose and document the wildcard certificate acquisition workflow.
Steps.step-3: Define how domain fronting and HTTPS coexist on port 443.
Steps.step-4: Bind certificate mounts and proxy edge config into the deployment contract.
